item.name: Thavnairian Cucumber
item.description:
Found on the shoals of Thavnair, it is as if this spiny creature lurks in wait for unsuspecting feet.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Watching their bloated, gelatinous forms drift through the waters would not whet many an appetite, but these wavekin make for a tasty treat when sufficiently dehydrated. Thus can they oft be found sun-drying on long sticks in Thavnairian fishing hamlets.
